params.deadline: Unix timestamp >= block.timestamp + 120.                 Call currentTime() to read block.timestamp,                 then add at least 120 to that value.
params.goal: Funding target in wei.                 Use 1000000000000000000 for 1 ETH.
params.title: Non-empty project name.

currentTime().details: Use this in Remix to calculate a valid deadline:         read this value, add >= 120, pass as the deadline argument.

claimRefund(uint256).notice: Backers reclaim 100 % of their contribution on a failed project.

contribute(uint256).notice: Send ETH to back a project.         In Remix: enter amount in VALUE field, then call contribute(id).

finalise(uint256).notice: Settle a project after its deadline. Anyone may call this.

getProject(uint256).notice: Full project details in one call — no loops.

withdraw(uint256).notice: Creator pulls net proceeds (98 %). One-shot pull pattern.

withdrawFees().notice: Hub owner collects accumulated protocol fees.

documentation.text:
@notice Send ETH to back a project.
         In Remix: enter amount in VALUE field, then call contribute(id).
@notice Settle a project after its deadline. Anyone may call this.
@notice Creator pulls net proceeds (98 %). One-shot pull pattern.
@notice Backers reclaim 100 % of their contribution on a failed project.
@notice Hub owner collects accumulated protocol fees.
@notice Full project details in one call — no loops.
